title: Mai Ƙirƙirar Hoton allo akan layi: Babu Rajista ko Alamar Ruwa
metaDescription: ScreenXRecorder kayan aiki ne kyauta don yin rikodin allo, ba tare da buƙatar rajista ko alamar ruwa ba. Yana dace da Windows, macOS da Linux.
